name: SLA Compliance Overview
query:
SELECT
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`name` AS "SLA ID:Link/Alpha Engagement SLA:140",
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`sla_level` AS "SLA Level:Data:180",
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`status` AS "Status:Data:100",
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`project` AS "Project:Link/Project:150",
  `tabProject`.`project_name` AS "Project Name:Data:200",
  `tabProject`.`custom_engagement_manager` AS "Engagement Manager:Link/User:150",
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`customer` AS "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`alpha_processing_deadline` AS "Deadline:Date:100",
  `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`creation` AS "Created On:Date:100",
  CASE
    WHEN `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`status` = 'Active' AND `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`alpha_processing_deadline` < CURDATE() THEN 'Overdue'
    WHEN `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`status` = 'Active' AND `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`alpha_processing_deadline` >= CURDATE() THEN 'On Track'
    ELSE `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`status`
  END AS "Health:Data:80"
FROM `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`
LEFT JOIN `tabProject` ON `tabProject`.`name` = `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`project`
WHERE `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`docstatus` = 1
ORDER BY `tabAlpha Engagement SLA`.`alpha_processing_deadline` ASC
